repair_memories_applied.natural_language: When opbuild fails in TilingFunc or InferShape because GetInputShape returns StorageShape* but code uses Shape* and calls GetOriginShape, do not assign to const gert::Shape* and call GetOriginShape; instead assign to const gert::StorageShape* and use its methods directly.

repair_memory_selection.selection_rationale: All five memories address common opbuild failures for ca6k operators: TilingData setter method errors (84bb2c98), duplicate REG_OP redefinition (a6bc156b), StorageShape-to-Shape conversion in TilingFunc (6e9b566c), tiling struct conflict causing zero output (d0a8c044), and StorageShape/Shape mismatch with GetOriginShape (5014fe8c). These are highly relevant to the first attempt on ca6k_04528, as similar issues frequently occur for torch#1 operators.
